title: West Africa Daily Intelligence Brief
executive_summary: Today's West Africa briefing is shaped primarily by security, politics and economy. Significant developments are concentrated in Benin, Ghana, Niger, The Gambia. Security pressures remain an important source of political and humanitarian risk; while economic policy and market conditions continue to influence investor confidence and household welfare.

learning.title: What is ECOWAS?
learning.description: The Economic Community of West African States was created to promote regional economic integration. It has also developed important political and security roles, including mediation, election monitoring and responses to unconstitutional changes of government.

methodology: Stories are collected from public Google News RSS searches, classified using keyword rules, filtered for near-duplicates and ranked using source quality, recency and political-risk relevance.
